bodyHtml:
研究对象: SPY,QQQ,IWM,NVDA

财务数据

一、口径说明

项目 说明
研究对象 本报告唯一研究对象为 SPY,QQQ,IWM,NVDA。
ETF 口径 SPY、QQQ、IWM 是投资基金，不是经营公司；基金无传统经营收入、毛利、净利润、ROE、ROIC 或经营现金流口径，因此本报告使用 Total investment income、Net investment income、Net increase/decrease in net assets resulting from operations、NAV Total Return、费用率、净资产、负债/资产等基金财务报表指标替代。[S1][S2][S3]
NVDA 口径 NVDA 是经营公司；收入、毛利、净利润、ROE、ROA、ROIC、杠杆、偿债和现金流质量均按经营公司财务报表口径测算。[S4][S5]
自测算规则 凡标注 [自测算] 的比率均由本表同一行或相邻表列示的源数据计算；主要公式为：毛利率 = Gross profit / Revenue，净利率 = Net income / Revenue，ETF 净投资收益率 = Net investment income / Total investment income，ROE = Net income / 平均股东权益，ROA = Net income / 平均总资产，ROIC = NOPAT / 平均投入资本，OCF / Net income = Net cash provided by operating activities / Net income。

二、三年收入、净利润、毛利率、净利率趋势

1. ETF 基金财务趋势

Ticker 财年/截至日 收入替代口径 净利润替代口径 毛利率 净利率/收益率替代口径

SPY 9/30/23 [S1] Total investment income: $6,330,054,008 [S1] Net increase in net assets resulting from operations: $71,754,355,144 [S1] 不适用：ETF 无销售成本/毛利口径 [S1] Net investment income / Total investment income = 94.28% [自测算: $5,968,090,269 / $6,330,054,008；输入见 S1]

QQQ 9/30/24 [S2] Total investment income: $2,270,852,283 [S2] Net increase in net assets resulting from operations: $76,186,156,408 [S2] 不适用：ETF 无销售成本/毛利口径 [S2] Net investment income / Total investment income = 77.75% [自测算: ,765,691,436 / $2,270,852,283；输入见 S2]

IWM 3/31/25 [S3] Total investment income: $925,623,630 [S3] Net decrease in net assets resulting from operations: $(4,055,426,796) [S3] 不适用：ETF 无销售成本/毛利口径 [S3] Net investment income / Total investment income = 86.09% [自测算: $796,905,308 / $925,623,630；输入见 S3]
IWM 3/31/24 [S3] Total investment income: 当前报告未列示三年汇总数 [S3] Net increase in net assets resulting from operations: 0,374,941,567 [S3] 不适用：ETF 无销售成本/毛利口径 [S3] Ratio to average net assets of net investment income: 1.38% [S3]
IWM 3/31/23 [S3] Total investment income: 当前报告未列示三年汇总数 [S3] Total from investment operations: $(23.98) per share [S3] 不适用：ETF 无销售成本/毛利口径 [S3] Ratio to average net assets of net investment income: 1.47% [S3]

五、现金流质量

Ticker 财年/截至日 OCF / Net income 现金流质量判断 依据
SPY 9/30/25 [S1] 不适用 [S1] ETF 不披露经营公司式 OCF；现金流质量应观察净投资收益、分配覆盖和申赎结构 [S1] Net investment income $7,412,419,527 [S1]，distributions from net investment income per Unit $(7.25) [S1]
QQQ 9/30/25 [S2] 不适用 [S2] ETF 不披露经营公司式 OCF；现金流质量应观察净投资收益、分配覆盖和申赎结构 [S2] Net investment income ,779,222,203 [S2]，distributions to shareholders from distributable earnings $(1,788,466,678) [S2]
IWM 3/31/25 [S3] 不适用 [S3] ETF 不披露经营公司式 OCF；现金流质量应观察净投资收益、分配覆盖和申赎结构 [S3] Net investment income $796,905,308 [S3]，decrease in net assets from distributions $(790,428,885) [S3]
NVDA FY2026 / Jan 25, 2026 [S4] 0.86x [自测算: 02,718 million / 20,067 million；输入见 S4] 经营现金流低于净利润，主要因应收账款、库存等营运资本扩张吸收现金 [S4] Net cash provided by operating activities 02,718 million [S4]，net income 20,067 million [S4]
NVDA FY2025 / Jan 26, 2025 [S4] 0.88x [自测算: $64,089 million / $72,880 million；输入见 S4] 经营现金流低于净利润，但仍保持高额正现金流 [S4] Net cash provided by operating activities $64,089 million [S4]，net income $72,880 million [S4]
NVDA FY2024 / Jan 28, 2024 [S4] 0.94x [自测算: $28,090 million / $29,760 million；输入见 S4] 经营现金流基本贴近净利润 [S4] Net cash provided by operating activities $28,090 million [S4]，net income $29,760 million [S4]

六、关键财务指标 vs 行业/可比平均

Ticker 可比口径 指标 目标值 行业/可比平均 判断
SPY 目标 ETF 组均值：SPY,QQQ,IWM，为遵守 target-only 约束，不引入目标外基金样本 Expense ratio / average net assets 0.09% [S1] 0.16% [自测算: (SPY 0.09% + QQQ 0.20% + IWM 0.19%) / 3；输入见 S1/S2/S3] 低于目标 ETF 组均值
SPY 目标 ETF 组均值：SPY,QQQ,IWM Net investment income / average net assets 1.20% [S1] 0.97% [自测算: (SPY 1.20% + QQQ 0.54% + IWM 1.17%) / 3；输入见 S1/S2/S3] 高于目标 ETF 组均值
QQQ 目标 ETF 组均值：SPY,QQQ,IWM Expense ratio / average net assets 0.20% [S2] 0.16% [自测算: (SPY 0.09% + QQQ 0.20% + IWM 0.19%) / 3；输入见 S1/S2/S3] 高于目标 ETF 组均值
QQQ 目标 ETF 组均值：SPY,QQQ,IWM Net investment income / average net assets 0.54% [S2] 0.97% [自测算: (SPY 1.20% + QQQ 0.54% + IWM 1.17%) / 3；输入见 S1/S2/S3] 低于目标 ETF 组均值
IWM 目标 ETF 组均值：SPY,QQQ,IWM Expense ratio / average net assets 0.19% [S3] 0.16% [自测算: (SPY 0.09% + QQQ 0.20% + IWM 0.19%) / 3；输入见 S1/S2/S3] 高于目标 ETF 组均值
IWM 目标 ETF 组均值：SPY,QQQ,IWM Net investment income / average net assets 1.17% [S3] 0.97% [自测算: (SPY 1.20% + QQQ 0.54% + IWM 1.17%) / 3；输入见 S1/S2/S3] 高于目标 ETF 组均值
NVDA Semiconductors Industry Gross margin 71.07% [自测算: 53,463 million / $215,938 million；输入见 S4] 44.62% [S6] 高于行业平均
NVDA Semiconductors Industry Net margin 55.60% [自测算: 20,067 million / $215,938 million；输入见 S4] 15.41% [S6] 高于行业平均
NVDA Semiconductors Industry ROE 101.49% [自测算: 20,067 million / ((57,293 million + $79,327 million) / 2)；输入见 S4] 40.84% [S7] 高于行业平均
NVDA Semiconductors Industry ROA 75.42% [自测算: 20,067 million / (($206,803 million + 11,601 million) / 2)；输入见 S4] 27.66% [S7] 高于行业平均
NVDA Semiconductors Industry ROIC 149.78% [自测算: NOPAT 10,676.39 million / 平均投入资本 ((03,205 million + $44,580 million) / 2)；输入见 S4] 9.77% [S7] 高于行业平均
NVDA Semiconductors Industry Debt / Equity 0.05x [自测算: $8,468 million / 57,293 million；输入见 S4] 1.44x [S8] 低于行业平均杠杆
NVDA Semiconductors Industry Quick ratio 未单独列示；Current ratio 为 3.91x [自测算: 25,605 million / $32,163 million；输入见 S4] 0.96x [S8] 流动性显著高于行业 quick ratio 参考值；但 current ratio 与 quick ratio 口径不同

七、结论摘要

Ticker 财务结论
SPY SPY 的基金收入替代口径 Total investment income 从 $6,330,054,008 [S1] 增至 $7,996,825,183 [S1]，净投资收益率从 94.28% [自测算: $5,968,090,269 / $6,330,054,008；输入见 S1] 降至 92.69% [自测算: $7,412,419,527 / $7,996,825,183；输入见 S1]，费用率维持 0.09% [S1]。
QQQ QQQ 的 Total investment income 从 ,527,283,632 [S2] 增至 $2,434,205,736 [S2]，净投资收益率在 73.09%-77.75% [自测算: 2025 为 ,779,222,203 / $2,434,205,736，2024 为 ,765,691,436 / $2,270,852,283，2023 为 ,180,067,881 / ,527,283,632；输入见 S2] 区间，费用率为 0.20% [S2]。
IWM IWM 在 3/31/25 [S3] 出现 net decrease in net assets resulting from operations $(4,055,426,796) [S3]，主要来自 net change in unrealized depreciation $(12,006,110,150) [S3]，但净投资收益仍为 $796,905,308 [S3]。
NVDA NVDA FY2026 [S4] 收入 $215,938 million [S4]、净利润 20,067 million [S4]、毛利率 71.07% [自测算: 53,463 million / $215,938 million]、净利率 55.60% [自测算: 20,067 million / $215,938 million]，ROE 101.49% [自测算: 20,067 million / ((57,293 million + $79,327 million) / 2)]、ROA 75.42% [自测算: 20,067 million / (($206,803 million + 11,601 million) / 2)]、ROIC 149.78% [自测算: NOPAT 10,676.39 million / 平均投入资本 ((03,205 million + $44,580 million) / 2)]，OCF / Net income 为 0.86x [自测算: 02,718 million / 20,067 million]。
